title: In Brasília-DF, three people spotted 2 round UFOs [1990]

text_preview: DEC, 12th, 1990. Time: 22:45. Duration: 45 seconds. Three people in Brasília, Distrito Federal, spotted two unidentified flying objects, round white, “star-sized” and leaving a trail when moving. According to the witnesses, one of the UFOs was sharper than the smaller one. The UFOs positioned themselves on top of the Brasilia tower, always close to each other. The trajectory of the two unknown objects was Northeast-Southwest, having been observed in a sky with few clouds and with the naked eye and binoculars. Complementary data from COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command]: “[the] object
summary: Three witnesses in Brasília saw two white round star-sized UFOs leaving trails, positioned over the TV tower and moving on a northeast-southwest trajectory.
